claim: The same major-regulator claim, checked against Perturb-seq in two non-immune cells (Replogle K562 and RPE1). Essentiality-artifact regulators replicate across cell types (housekeeping, in both K562 and RPE1); the activation module does not (T-cell-specific). Independent cells validate findings #1 and #3.
